key: listening4_my_plans
text: I am a project manager at Novartis, and I have a new plan. Next month, I am going to lead a new project. First, my team and I are going to meet and set our goals. Then we are going to work for a few months. We will launch the product in October. I am very excited. I think it will be a great success.

key: listening4_prediction
text: Aline has a big goal this year. She is going to launch a new product soon. Will it be ready in time? She thinks so. The team will probably finish in September, and the launch will be in October. Aline says, I promise we will do our best.

key: Hi Aline! Are you ready for the new project?
text: Hi Aline! Are you ready for the new project?

key: Yes! I am going to lead it this time.
text: Yes! I am going to lead it this time.

key: Great. What is your plan?
text: Great. What is your plan?

key: First, we are going to meet the team next week.
text: First, we are going to meet the team next week.

key: And when are you going to launch?
text: And when are you going to launch?

key: We will launch in October. That is my goal.
text: We will launch in October. That is my goal.

key: Do you think it will be ready?
text: Do you think it will be ready?

key: Yes, I think it will be ready soon.
text: Yes, I think it will be ready soon.

key: Will you need more people?
text: Will you need more people?

key: Maybe. I will probably hire two engineers.
text: Maybe. I will probably hire two engineers.

key: Perfect. I will help you with the budget.
text: Perfect. I will help you with the budget.

text: Aline gets a new project. She makes a plan. Next week she is going to meet the team. They are going to work for a few months. They will launch in October, and Aline thinks it will be a success.
